---
title: "Genefusion Experiments"
format:
    revealjs:
        theme: solarized
        css: theme.scss
---

## Outline

- Workflow
- ERG-TMPRSS2 functional equivalence
- ERG-TMPRSS2 maximal score
- Novel fusion discovery
- Score function evaluation
- Benchmark fusions recurrent in normal samples
- Supplemental

## Workflow

- Pass

## ERG-TMPRSS2 functional equivalence

![ERG-TMPRSS2 breakpoint scatter](../results/2026_03-func_equiv_exp/breakpoint_scatter_hist.png)

![Functionally equivalent sample count](../results/2026_03-func_equiv_exp/func_equiv_samples.png)

## ERG-TMPRSS2 maximal score

![Prostate fusion score distribution](../results/2025_11-score/prostate/null_v_pcawg_hist.png)

## Novel fusion discovery POLR3GL--LIX1L

- Top sample
- POLR3GL has [high expression](https://www.proteinatlas.org/ENSG00000121851-POLR3GL/cancer) in liver cancers
- LIX1L is reported oncogene for liver and other cancers [1](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34221869/), [2](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC4550850/)

![liver POLR3GL--LIX1L_DEL_ev15](../results/2026_02-samplot_validation/plot_data/plots/liver_POLR3GL--LIX1L_DEL_ev15.png)

## Novel fusion discovery 

- Bottom sample

![liver RAB9A--TRAPPC2_DEL_ev15](../results/2026_02-samplot_validation/plot_data/plots/liver_RAB9A--TRAPPC2_DEL_ev15.png)

## Novel fusion discovery 

- Top sample

![kidney SHPK--ITGAE_DEL_ev6](../results/2026_02-samplot_validation/plot_data/plots/kidney_SHPK--ITGAE_DEL_ev6.png)

## Novel fusion discovery

- Top sample
- USP49 is [lowly expressed in kidney cancer samples](https://www.proteinatlas.org/ENSG00000164663-USP49/cancer)

![kidney USP49--CCND3_DEL_ev6](../results/2026_02-samplot_validation/plot_data/plots/kidney_USP49--CCND3_DEL_ev6.png)

## Score function evaluation

![Score function evaluation](../results/2026_03-expected_score_eval/ideal_score_eval.png)

## PCAWG tissue-wise fusions

![PCAWG breast fusions](../results/2025_11-score/breast/rand_v_pcawg_hist.png)
![PCAWG kidney fusions](../results/2025_11-score/kidney/rand_v_pcawg_hist.png)
![PCAWG liver fusions](../results/2025_11-score/liver/rand_v_pcawg_hist.png)
![PCAWG ovary fusions](../results/2025_11-score/ovary/rand_v_pcawg_hist.png)
![PCAWG prostate fusions](../results/2025_11-score/prostate/null_v_pcawg_hist.png)


## Benchmark fusions recurrent in normal samples

![Benchmark all](../results/2025_09-haas_onekg/haas_onekg_readcount_histogram.png)
![Benchmark filtered by annotation](../results/2025_09-haas_onekg/haas_onekg_readcount_histogram_filtered_out.png)
![Benchmark post-filter](../results/2025_09-haas_onekg/haas_onekg_readcount_histogram_filt.png)

## Miscelleneous: burden
